system.description:
Discipline: Dianxue
Skill: Arm Strike against Parry
Type: Normal
Qi: 6

You tap the governing vessel along your foe’s back with the tip of your finger, causing the balance of energy to disrupt as you desire. This unleashes a flood of deadly energy in the body that can only be stopped by the Finger of Supreme Compassion. On a Success the target takes 1d10 Damage per Rank of Qi. This can be hot or cold energy and continues each round until someone stops it with Finger of Supreme Compassion. There is a way to stave off the effect of this ability but it is not for the faint of heart. If one consumes a human heart, that can temporarily hold off the effects for three days. Cathartic: On a Success the target takes 2d10 Damage per Rank of Qi, which continues every round until someone stops it with Finger of Supreme Compassion. This can exceed the normal 6d10 capping limits (up to a maximum of 10d10).
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.catharticEffect: On a Success the target takes 2d10 Damage per Rank of Qi, which continues every round until someone stops it with Finger of Supreme Compassion. This can exceed the normal 6d10 capping limits (up to a maximum of 10d10).
